name: Minimum Extra Characters in a String
description: You are given a 0-indexed string s and a dictionary of words. You have to break s into one or more non-overlapping substrings such that each substring is present in the dictionary. There may be some extra characters in s which are not present in any substring. Return the minimum number of extra characters left over if you break up s optimally. Use a Trie to store the dictionary and DP to find the minimum extra characters.
constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 50. 1 <= dictionary.length <= 50. 1 <= dictionary[i].length <= 50. dictionary[i] and s consist of only lowercase English letters.
python_template:
# Minimum Extra Characters in a String

from typing import List

    pass

performance.target_time: O(n * m) where n is string length and m is max dictionary word length
accepted_time: O(n * m) where n is string length and m is max dictionary word length
performance.stress_intent: exercise max-length strings with many overlapping dictionary words that punish brute-force substring checking
